transcription.text: I don't know what you've been told But time is running out, no need to take it slow I'm stepping to your toe-to-toe I should be scared honey, maybe so But I ain't worried about it right now Keeping dreams alive, 1999 heroes I ain't worried about it right now Swimming in the flames, dancing on the clouds below I ain't worried about it
